name: 60-Month Public Charity Operation Termination

eligibility.description: Private foundations seeking to transition to public charity status (509(a)(1), (2), or (3)) over a five-year period.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Foundations can avoid termination taxes by operating as a public charity for a continuous 60-month period and notifying the IRS before the period begins.
